nodes.name: Streak-capped spinetail
nodes.summary: Streak-capped spinetail（Streak-capped spinetail，学名 Cranioleuca hellmayri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Outram Bangs、原始森林、次生林。

nodes.name: Outram Bangs
nodes.summary: Outram Bangs (January 12, 1863 – September 22, 1932) was an American zoologist.

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The streak-capped spinetail (Cranioleuca hellmayri) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Colombia and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits montane evergreen forest, both primary and secondary

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits montane evergreen forest, both primary and secondary
